int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  {if (tmp) {
    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else {

  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}
void start_simulation(void) 
{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;

  {
  {
  kernel_st = 0;
  update_channels();
  init_threads();
  fire_delta_events();
  activate_threads();
  reset_delta_events();
  }
  {
  while (1) {
    while_7_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    kernel_st = 1;
    eval();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 2;
    update_channels();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 3;
    fire_delta_events();
    activate_threads();
    reset_delta_events();
    }
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp == 0) {
      {
      kernel_st = 4;
      fire_time_events();
      activate_threads();
      reset_time_events();
      }
    } else

    }}
    {
    tmp___0 = stop_simulation();
    }
    {if (tmp___0) {
      goto while_7_break;
    } else {

    }}
  }
  while_7_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}

{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {
  init_model();
  start_simulation();
  }
  __retres1 = 0;
  return (__retres1);
}

End Main   

Input File is : token_ring.05_false-unreach-call_false-termination.cil_braced.c

Finished call to function ParseAST   
typedef enum {myFalse, myTrue} myBool; myBool __VERIFIER_nondet_myBool(void);
extern void __VERIFIER_reached_control(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_loop_head(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_control_true(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_control_false(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_error() __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

/* Generated by CIL v. 1.3.6 */
/* print_CIL_Input is true */

void error(void) 
{ 

  {
  ERROR: __VERIFIER_error();
  return;
}

void master(void) 
{ 
int tmp_var ;
  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(58, __func__);
if (m_pc == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(58, __func__);

    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(60, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(61, __func__);
if (m_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(61, __func__);

      goto M_WAIT;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(63, __func__);


    }}
  }}
  M_ENTRY: ;
  {

 while (1) { __VERIFIER_loop_head(69, __func__);

int is_master_triggered(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(294, __func__);
if (m_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(294, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(295, __func__);
if (E_M == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(295, __func__);

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(298, __func__);


    }}
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(301, __func__);


  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}
int is_transmit1_triggered(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(313, __func__);
if (t1_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(313, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(314, __func__);
if (E_1 == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(314, __func__);

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(317, __func__);


    }}
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(320, __func__);


  }}
  __retres1 = 0;

}

void activate_threads(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;
  int tmp___1 ;
  int tmp___2 ;
  int tmp___3 ;
  int tmp___4 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = is_master_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(745, __func__);
if (tmp) { __VERIFIER_control_true(745, __func__);

    m_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(747, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___0 = is_transmit1_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(753, __func__);
if (tmp___0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(753, __func__);

    t1_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(755, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___1 = is_transmit2_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(761, __func__);

    t2_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(763, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___2 = is_transmit3_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(769, __func__);

    t3_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(771, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___3 = is_transmit4_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(777, __func__);
if (tmp___3) { __VERIFIER_control_true(777, __func__);

    t4_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(779, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___4 = is_transmit5_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(785, __func__);

    t5_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(787, __func__);


  }}

  return;
}
}
void immediate_notify(void) 
{ 

  {
  {
  activate_threads();
  }

  return;
}
}
void fire_time_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  M_E = 1;

  return;
}

  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(873, __func__);

    E_5 = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(875, __func__);


  }}

  return;
}
}
void init_model(void) 
{ 

  {
  m_i = 1;
  t1_i = 1;
  t2_i = 1;
  t3_i = 1;
  t4_i = 1;
  t5_i = 1;

  return;
}
}
int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(904, __func__);
if (tmp) { __VERIFIER_control_true(904, __func__);

    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(907, __func__);


  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}

}
